title: rubus campaniensis
intro: Rubus campaniensis, also known as the Alpine Raspberry or Raspberry Bramble, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects due to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The plant's health benefits are attributed to its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce oxidative stress, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Rubus campaniensis can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in jams and preserves, to harness its medicinal and nutritional benefits.
